mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT t.year FROM eval_type_52 t INNER JOIN eval_target_mapping_52 m ON t.id = m.eval_type_id WHERE t.id = 3 ORDER BY t.year DESC

SELECT m.eval_type_id AS typeId, FORMAT(t.start_date, 'yyyy-MM-dd') + ' ~ ' + FORMAT(t.end_date, 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS evalPeriod, m.evaluatee_no AS empNo, e.name AS empName, d.name AS deptName, e.position AS position, CASE WHEN m.status = 0 THEN '본인평가중' WHEN m.status = 1 THEN '1차평가대기' WHEN m.status = 2 THEN '평가완료' ELSE '대기' END AS status FROM eval_target_mapping_52 m JOIN employee_52 e ON m.evaluatee_no = e.emp_no JOIN department_52 d ON e.dept_id = d.id JOIN eval_type_52 t ON m.eval_type_id = t.id WHERE m.eval_type_id = 3 AND m.step = 0 AND e.status = 'ACTIVE' AND (e.emp_no = #{currentEmpNo} OR d.leader_emp_no = #{currentEmpNo})
AND t.year = #{year}
AND MONTH(t.start_date) BETWEEN 1 AND 6
AND MONTH(t.start_date) BETWEEN 7 AND 12
ORDER BY (CASE WHEN e.emp_no = #{currentEmpNo} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END), e.emp_no ASC

SELECT TOP 1 m.eval_type_id AS typeId, m.evaluatee_no AS empNo, e.name AS empName, d.name AS deptName, e.position AS position, d.leader_emp_no AS leaderEmpNo, CASE WHEN m.status = 0 THEN '본인평가중' WHEN m.status = 1 THEN '1차평가대기' WHEN m.status = 2 THEN '평가완료' ELSE '대기' END AS status FROM eval_target_mapping_52 m JOIN employee_52 e ON m.evaluatee_no = e.emp_no JOIN department_52 d ON e.dept_id = d.id WHERE m.eval_type_id = #{typeId} AND m.evaluatee_no = #{empNo} AND m.step = 0

SELECT q.id AS questionId, q.category AS categoryName, q.question AS itemName, q.goal_desc AS goalDesc, q.weight AS weight, CASE WHEN CAST(a1.score AS VARCHAR) LIKE '1%' THEN 'S' WHEN CAST(a1.score AS VARCHAR) LIKE '0.9%' THEN 'A' WHEN CAST(a1.score AS VARCHAR) LIKE '0.8%' THEN 'B' WHEN CAST(a1.score AS VARCHAR) LIKE '0.7%' THEN 'C' WHEN CAST(a1.score AS VARCHAR) LIKE '0.6%' THEN 'D' ELSE '' END AS selfGrade, a1.content AS selfFeedback, CASE WHEN CAST(a2.score AS VARCHAR) LIKE '1%' THEN 'S' WHEN CAST(a2.score AS VARCHAR) LIKE '0.9%' THEN 'A' WHEN CAST(a2.score AS VARCHAR) LIKE '0.8%' THEN 'B' WHEN CAST(a2.score AS VARCHAR) LIKE '0.7%' THEN 'C' WHEN CAST(a2.score AS VARCHAR) LIKE '0.6%' THEN 'D' ELSE '' END AS firstGrade, a2.content AS firstFeedback FROM eval_question_52 q LEFT JOIN eval_answer_52 a1 ON q.id = a1.question_id AND a1.mapping_id = (SELECT TOP 1 id FROM eval_target_mapping_52 WHERE evaluatee_no = #{empNo} AND eval_type_id = #{typeId} AND step = 0 ORDER BY id DESC) LEFT JOIN eval_answer_52 a2 ON q.id = a2.question_id AND a2.mapping_id = (SELECT TOP 1 id FROM eval_target_mapping_52 WHERE evaluatee_no = #{empNo} AND eval_type_id = #{typeId} AND step = 1 ORDER BY id DESC) WHERE q.type_id = #{typeId} ORDER BY q.id ASC
mapper.update: IF EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM eval_answer_52 WHERE question_id = #{item.questionId} AND mapping_id = ( SELECT TOP 1 id FROM eval_target_mapping_52 WHERE evaluatee_no = #{empNo} AND eval_type_id = #{typeId} AND step = 0 ORDER BY id DESC ) ) BEGIN UPDATE eval_answer_52 SET score = CASE #{item.selfGrade} WHEN 'S' THEN 1.0 WHEN 'A' THEN 0.9 WHEN 'B' THEN 0.8 WHEN 'C' THEN 0.7 WHEN 'D' THEN 0.6 ELSE NULL END, content = #{item.selfFeedback} WHERE question_id = #{item.questionId} AND mapping_id = ( SELECT TOP 1 id FROM eval_target_mapping_52 WHERE evaluatee_no = #{empNo} AND eval_type_id = #{typeId} AND step = 0 ORDER BY id DESC ) END ELSE BEGIN INSERT INTO eval_answer_52 (question_id, mapping_id, score, content, created_at) VALUES ( #{item.questionId}, (SELECT TOP 1 id FROM eval_target_mapping_52 WHERE evaluatee_no = #{empNo} AND eval_type_id = #{typeId} AND step = 0 ORDER BY id DESC), CASE #{item.selfGrade} WHEN 'S' THEN 1.0 WHEN 'A' THEN 0.9 WHEN 'B' THEN 0.8 WHEN 'C' THEN 0.7 WHEN 'D' THEN 0.6 ELSE NULL END, #{item.selfFeedback}, GETDATE() ) END

IF EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM eval_answer_52 WHERE question_id = #{item.questionId} AND mapping_id = ( SELECT TOP 1 id FROM eval_target_mapping_52 WHERE evaluatee_no = #{empNo} AND eval_type_id = #{typeId} AND step = 1 ORDER BY id DESC ) ) BEGIN UPDATE eval_answer_52 SET score = CASE #{item.firstGrade} WHEN 'S' THEN 1.0 WHEN 'A' THEN 0.9 WHEN 'B' THEN 0.8 WHEN 'C' THEN 0.7 WHEN 'D' THEN 0.6 ELSE NULL END, content = #{item.firstFeedback} WHERE question_id = #{item.questionId} AND mapping_id = ( SELECT TOP 1 id FROM eval_target_mapping_52 WHERE evaluatee_no = #{empNo} AND eval_type_id = #{typeId} AND step = 1 ORDER BY id DESC ) END ELSE BEGIN INSERT INTO eval_answer_52 (question_id, mapping_id, score, content, created_at) VALUES ( #{item.questionId}, (SELECT TOP 1 id FROM eval_target_mapping_52 WHERE evaluatee_no = #{empNo} AND eval_type_id = #{typeId} AND step = 1 ORDER BY id DESC), CASE #{item.firstGrade} WHEN 'S' THEN 1.0 WHEN 'A' THEN 0.9 WHEN 'B' THEN 0.8 WHEN 'C' THEN 0.7 WHEN 'D' THEN 0.6 ELSE NULL END, #{item.firstFeedback}, GETDATE() ) END
